nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Thick-billed vireo
nodes.summary: Thick-billed vireo（Thick-billed vireo，学名 Vireo crassirostris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于開曼群島，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: 開曼群島
nodes.summary: 開曼群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Caribbean dove、White-crowned pigeon、北撲翅鴷等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: alleni: the Cayman Islands The species has also been recorded several times in Florida. The thick-billed vireo inhabits deciduous woodlands, scrublands, and mangroves

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: alleni: the Cayman Islands The species has also been recorded several times in Florida. The thick-billed vireo inhabits deciduous woodlands, scrublands, and mangroves
